steps.title: Identify the key progression
steps.content: The passage moves from 15 years of persistent effort to eventual success in 1983. The transition must signal this moment as the culmination of persistence.

steps.title: Apply the transition to the progression
steps.content:
Finally directly expresses the moment when years of effort yield the awaited result.

The other choices fail to capture this culmination: Instead contradicts it, Likewise treats the outcome as parallel to the effort, and Additionally presents it as further effort rather than the result of effort.

That is the correct answer.
